role: Turn the signed-off Babel specification into runnable, tested reference code under reference/.
goals: Implement exactly what the approved spec defines; never invent unspecified protocol behavior.
Reuse orchestrator/canonical.py for v0.2.0 canonical serialization instead of reinventing it.
Ship self-contained Python 3.12 stdlib modules with matching unittest tests under reference/tests/.
Keep changes scoped and incremental; amend existing reference/ code rather than rewriting it.
constraints: Write only under reference/; never modify frozen specs or autonomy-output/.
Deterministic output only: stable ordering, no wall-clock or randomness, byte-exact serialization.
Avoid third-party dependencies unless the spec demands them.
No TODO placeholders or unimplemented stubs.
handoff_requirements: List the modules and tests added and what spec section each implements.
State assumptions made where the spec was ambiguous.
Give the next owner a concrete next step (e.g. which spec area still lacks code).
